---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem so it can be fixed
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: [bug]
assignees: []
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Speak / type '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or console output if available.

## Screenshots / recordings

If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 140, Safari 18]
- Node version: [e.g. 22.x]
- Deployment: [local dev / Vercel]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here. Do not paste secrets, tokens, or keys.
